params.name: ending_before
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `ending_before` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, starting with `obj_bar`, your subsequent call can include `ending_before=obj_bar` in order to fetch the previous page of the list.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100, and the default is 10.

params.name: starting_after
params.description: A cursor for use in pagination. `starting_after` is an object ID that defines your place in the list. For instance, if you make a list request and receive 100 objects, ending with `obj_foo`, your subsequent call can include `starting_after=obj_foo` in order to fetch the next page of the list.

items.docs: Lists all Climate order objects. The orders are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recently created orders appearing first.
Creates a Climate order object for a given Climate product. The order will be processed immediately after creation and payment will be deducted your Stripe balance.

params.name: expand
params.description: Specifies which fields in the response should be expanded.

params.name: order
params.description: Unique identifier of the order.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a Climate order object with the given ID.

params.name: order
params.description: Unique identifier of the order.

items.docs: Updates the specified order by setting the values of the parameters passed.

info.name: Stripe Post   Climate Orders Order Cancel

params.name: order
params.description: Unique identifier of the order.

items.docs: Cancels a Climate order. You can cancel an order within 30 days of creation. Stripe refunds the reservation amount_subtotal, but not the amount_fees for user-triggered cancellations. Frontier might cancel reservations if suppliers fail to deliver. If Frontier cancels the reservation, Stripe provides 90 days advance notice and refunds the amount_total.
